title: 10 best herbal capsules for eye floaters
intro_desc: Herbal capsules for eye floaters are a natural remedy designed to reduce the visibility of eye floaters, which appear as small spots or cobwebs in one's field of vision. These herbal supplements typically contain a combination of vitamins and herbs such as ginkgo biloba, bilberry extract, and Lutein that work together to improve blood flow to the eyes and strengthen the retina. By taking these capsules, individuals can significantly reduce their eye floaters, improving their quality of life by reducing eye strain and discomfort. For example, a person who takes herbal capsules for eye floaters may be able to read or watch TV without being distracted by floating objects in their vision.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Maidenhair tree capsules helps with eye floaters because they contain a rich source of antioxidants, flavonoids, and polysaccharides that work synergistically to reduce inflammation in the eyes. The capsules' unique blend also improves blood flow and circulation to the retina, allowing oxygen and nutrients to reach the affected areas more efficiently. This increased nourishment helps to clear up eye floaters, reducing their visibility and discomfort, and promoting overall ocular health and well-being.
remedy_properties: Adaptoogenic property: Herbal Maidenhair Tree capsules have adaptogenic properties, which allow them to normalize and balance the body's response to stress, including reducing inflammation in the eyes that can contribute to eye floaters.

Anti-inflammatory property: The capsules' anti-inflammatory properties help reduce swelling and irritation in the eyes, which can alleviate symptoms of eye floaters such as blurred vision and discomfort.

Antioxidant property: The antioxidant properties of the herbal Maidenhair Tree capsules help protect the eyes from damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to age-related eye conditions like cataracts and macular degeneration that may be related to eye floaters.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the maidenhair tree contain compounds that have anti-inflammatory properties, which can help reduce the appearance and discomfort associated with eye floaters.
Barks: The barks of the maidenhair tree have been traditionally used to treat various eye disorders, including those related to floaters, due to their astringent and antiseptic properties.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh ginkgo biloba leaves from a trusted source according to traditional methods.
Dry the leaves in a warm and well-ventilated area for 7 days or until crispy.
Grind the dried ginkgo biloba leaves into a fine powder using a coffee grinder at medium speed for 1 minute.
Mix 500mg of ginkgo biloba powder with 1000mg of vitamin e oil and fill capsules according to manufacturer instructions within 2 hours of preparation.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 6 months or until consumed.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Blueberry capsules helps with eye floaters because they are rich in antioxidants, specifically anthocyanins, which have potent anti-inflammatory properties. These compounds help to reduce inflammation in the vitreous humor, a clear gel-like substance that fills the center of the eyeball. By reducing inflammation, blueberry capsules may help to reduce the appearance of eye floaters, or small specks or strings that appear to float across one's vision due to age-related changes in the vitreous humor.
remedy_properties: Anthocyanins: These powerful antioxidants have been shown to reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in the eyes, which can contribute to the formation of eye floaters.

Quercetin: This flavonoid has anti-inflammatory and anti-vasoprotective properties that may help improve blood vessel health in the retina, reducing the likelihood of blood spots or hemorrhages that can cause eye floaters.

Cyanidin-3-glycoside (C3G): This anthocyanin derivative has been found to have vasodilatory effects, which may help reduce intraocular pressure and improve circulation in the eyes, potentially reducing the appearance of eye floaters.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, blueberry roots help reduce inflammation and promote healthy vision.
Barks: Containing flavonoids and phenolic acids, blueberry barks have been shown to improve blood circulation and reduce the appearance of eye floaters.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality vaccinium myrtillus leaves from a trusted source and dry them thoroughly.
Grind the dried leaves into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix 1000mg of the powdered vaccinium myrtillus with 500mg of silica gel in a small bowl for uniform blending.
Fill #00 capsules with the blended mixture and seal them immediately to preserve potency.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Turmeric capsules helps with eye floaters because they contain curcumin, a powerful anti-inflammatory compound that reduces oxidative stress in the eyes. This stress is often associated with the formation of vitreous gel clots that cause floaters to appear. By reducing inflammation and improving blood flow to the eyes, turmeric capsules can help dissolve these clots and alleviate symptoms such as blurred vision and eye strain. Additionally, curcumin's antioxidant properties protect against damage caused by free radicals, further supporting overall eye health and clarity.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory compound Curcumin: Reduces inflammation in the eye, which can alleviate symptoms of eye floaters and prevent further damage to the retina.
Antioxidant properties: Neutralizes free radicals that can contribute to age-related macular degeneration (AMD), a common cause of eye floaters, and helps protect the eyes from oxidative stress.
Bioavailability-enhancing Piperine: Improves absorption and bioavailability of curcumin, allowing it to reach the eyes more effectively and provide greater relief for eye floater symptoms.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: The rhizome of turmeric is rich in curcuminoids, which have potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help reduce inflammation and oxidative stress associated with eye floaters.
Roots: Turmeric roots contain a compound called turmerin, which has been shown to have neuroprotective effects and may help alleviate symptoms of eye floaters such as blurry vision and eye strain.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality dried turmeric rhizomes turmeric powder 500 mg.
Grind the turmeric powder into a fine consistency for proper encapsulation.
Mix the ground turmeric with gelatin and water to form a uniform paste 10 minutes.
Fill empty capsules with the prepared turmeric mixture using an encapsulator machine 5 seconds.
Store the finished curcuma longa capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for 2 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Ginger capsules help with eye floaters because they promote blood flow and reduce inflammation in the eyes. The capsaicin present in ginger has natural anti-inflammatory properties that help to alleviate symptoms of age-related macular degeneration, a common cause of eye floaters. Additionally, the antioxidants in ginger capsules protect the delicate tissues in the eyes from damage caused by free radicals, reducing the appearance and frequency of eye floaters. This natural approach can provide relief from the discomfort and distress associated with these bothersome vision disturbances.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Ginger's anti-inflammatory compounds, such as gingerols and shogaols, help reduce inflammation in the eyes, which can contribute to the formation and visibility of eye floaters.

Antioxidant properties: Ginger's antioxidant properties help neutralize free radicals that can damage the retina and lead to the development of eye floaters, thereby protecting the eyes from oxidative stress.

Vasodilatory properties: Ginger's vasodilatory compounds, such as gingerols, help increase blood flow to the eyes, which may improve circulation and reduce the visibility of eye floaters by reducing the formation of blood vessels behind the retina.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: The rhyzomes of ginger contain compounds like gingerol and shogaol, which have anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce eye inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with eye floaters.
Roots: Ginger roots are a rich source of antioxidants and bioactive compounds, which can help protect the eyes from damage caused by oxidative stress and promote overall ocular health.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 20 grams of fresh ginger root and wash it thoroughly under cold running water.
Cut the ginger root into small pieces and grind them into a fine powder using a spice grinder.
Combine 10 grams of the powdered ginger with 200 milliliters of boiling distilled water to create a decoction.
Simmer the mixture for 30 minutes, then strain it through a cheesecloth or fine-mesh sieve into a clean glass container.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with 500 milligrams of the ginger decoction and seal them tightly.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Chicory capsules helps with eye floaters because they contain a powerful combination of herbs that work together to reduce inflammation and improve circulation in the eyes. The bioactive compounds present in chicory, such as flavonoids and polyphenols, have potent antioxidant properties that help neutralize free radicals responsible for causing oxidative stress in the retina. This natural treatment helps clear out debris and adhesions that cause eye floaters, allowing individuals to enjoy sharper vision and improved overall ocular health.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Chicory capsules help reduce inflammation in the eyes and surrounding tissues, which can alleviate symptoms of eye floaters such as discomfort and blurred vision.
Antioxidant properties: Chicory's antioxidants neutralize free radicals that can damage eye tissue and contribute to the formation of eye floaters, helping to protect the eyes from further harm.

Vasodilating properties: The compounds in chicory capsules help relax blood vessels in the eyes, improving blood flow and reducing pressure on the retina, which can contribute to the appearance of eye floaters.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the chicory plant contain inulin, a prebiotic fiber that helps to reduce inflammation and promote healing in the eyes.
Barks: Chicory barks have been traditionally used to treat eye disorders due to their ability to soothe and calm irritated eyes.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh cichorium intybus leaves and clean them thoroughly with distilled water.
Air-dry the leaves for 24 hours before grinding them into a fine powder using a spice grinder.
Mix one part of the ground cichorium intybus powder with two parts of gelatin and add distilled water to create a paste.
Fill empty capsules with one-quarter teaspoon of the herbal mixture and seal immediately.
Store the prepared capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Pot marigold capsules helps with eye floaters because they contain antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds that reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the eyes. The herbs in the capsules, such as calendula, work to strengthen the tiny blood vessels in the retina, reducing the likelihood of debris accumulating and causing floaters. Additionally, the antioxidant properties help to protect the eyes from damage caused by free radicals, further reducing the appearance of floaters. As a result, pot marigold capsules can provide natural relief for individuals experiencing eye floaters.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Pot marigold contains antioxidants like lutein and zeaxanthin, which help to protect the eyes from oxidative stress and inflammation, reducing the appearance of eye floaters.

Anti-inflammatory properties: The anti-inflammatory compounds in pot marigold capsules, such as flavonoids and carotenoids, can help to reduce inflammation in the eyes and alleviate symptoms associated with eye floaters, including blurred vision and eye strain.
Vasodilatory properties: Pot marigold's vasodilatory effects can help to improve blood flow to the eyes, reducing the formation of small blood clots that can cause eye floaters.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the pot marigold plant contain bioactive compounds that have anti-inflammatory properties, which can help reduce the formation of eye floaters.
Seeds: Pot marigold seeds are rich in antioxidants and omega-3 fatty acids, which can help to protect the retina from damage and promote overall eye health.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality dried calendula officinalis flowers and sift them through a fine-mesh sieve to remove any debris.
Weigh out 200 milligrams of the dried flower petals and grind them into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle for five minutes.
Mix the powdered calendula with 500 milligrams of gelatin capsules and gently stir the mixture clockwise for three minutes.
Fill empty gelatin capsules by spooning the calendula-gelatin mixture into each capsule, ensuring not to overfill or underfill the capsules.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to six months or refrigerate them for up to one year.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Eyebright capsules helps with eye floaters because they contain a potent blend of herbal extracts that help to reduce the formation of fibrotic tissue in the vitreous humor, where floaters often develop. The antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds in eyebright also work to calm inflammation and reduce oxidative stress in the eyes, which can contribute to the appearance of floaters. Additionally, eyebright's natural vasodilatory properties may help to improve blood flow to the retina, further reducing the visibility of floaters.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Eyebright capsules contain compounds like flavonoids and phenolic acids, which reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in the eyes, helping to alleviate symptoms of eye floaters.

Vasodilatory effects: The herbs in eyebright capsules, such as Echinacea and Goldenseal, can help dilate blood vessels in the eyes, improving circulation and reducing the appearance of eye floaters by reducing the accumulation of debris in the vitreous humor.

Antioxidant properties: The antioxidants present in eyebright capsules, including vitamins C and E, help protect the eyes from damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to the formation of eye floaters.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of Eyebright are rich in flavonoids and saponins, which have anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce swelling and alleviate symptoms associated with eye floaters.
Seeds: Eyebright seeds contain a high concentration of antioxidants, including flavonoids and phenolic acids, which may help protect the eyes from further damage and promote healing.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh euphrasia officinalis leaves and flowers in the early morning dew ensuring optimal potency.
Dry the harvested plant material using shade drying or air circulation at room temperature for 7-10 days.
Crush the dried euphrasia officinalis into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle or coffee grinder taking care not to generate heat.
Mix the powdered euphrasia officinalis with 200mg of gelatin capsules in a ratio of 500mg herb to 1 capsule filling each capsule completely within 30 minutes.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 2 years or refrigerate for up to 6 months ensuring proper labeling and dosing instructions.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Goldenseal capsules helps with eye floaters because they contain berberine, a natural compound that has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. When taken regularly, goldenseal capsules can help reduce inflammation in the eyes, which is often associated with eye floaters. Additionally, the antioxidants in goldenseal may help repair damaged retinal cells and tissues, which can also contribute to the appearance of eye floaters. By reducing inflammation and promoting cellular health, goldenseal capsules may help alleviate symptoms of eye floaters and promote overall eye health.
remedy_properties: Berberine: Has anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help reduce inflammation and prevent infection in the eyes, potentially reducing the appearance of eye floaters.
Hydrastis: Contains flavonoids, which are antioxidants that can help protect the eyes from oxidative stress and damage, potentially reducing the formation of floaters.
Berberine's Vasoactive Properties: Has a vasoconstrictive effect on blood vessels, which can help reduce inflammation and swelling in the eye, potentially reducing the appearance of floaters.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots contain berberine, a natural compound with anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help reduce inflammation and promote healing in the eyes.
Rhyzomes: Rhyzomes, the underground stems of the goldenseal plant, are rich in alkaloids like berberine, which have been traditionally used to treat eye conditions including eye floaters.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 10 grams of dried goldenseal root extract and transfer it to a mortar and pestle.
Grind the dried goldenseal root extract into a fine powder using a gentle grinding motion.
Sift the powdered goldenseal root extract through a fine-mesh sieve to remove any lumps or large particles.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with 250 milligrams of the sifted powdered goldenseal root extract and seal them tightly.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to six months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Marshmallow capsules helps with eye floaters because they contain a unique combination of herbs that work together to nourish and support the delicate tissues in the eyes. The herbs, such as chamomile and calendula, have anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce swelling and irritation caused by debris or protein fragments floating in the vitreous humor. By promoting healthy eye tissues, herbal marshmallow capsules may help reduce the appearance of eye floaters and improve overall vision clarity.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Marshmallow root has anti-inflammatory compounds that can reduce inflammation and irritation in the eyes, which may help alleviate symptoms of eye floaters such as discomfort and blurred vision.

Antioxidant properties: The antioxidants present in marshmallow root capsules can help protect the delicate tissues of the eyes from damage caused by free radicals, which may contribute to the formation of eye floaters.
Mucilage content: Marshmallow root contains a type of fiber called mucilage, which can help soothe and lubricate the eyes, reducing dryness and irritation that can exacerbate eye floaters.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in mucilage, which helps to soothe and lubricate the eyes, reducing discomfort caused by eye floaters.
Barks: Contain anti-inflammatory compounds that help to reduce inflammation and irritation associated with eye floaters.
remedy_recipe: Harvest aloe vera leaves of sufficient quantity for processing into capsules.
Dry the harvested leaves at room temperature for 7-10 days or by oven drying at 60°c for 2 hours.
Grind dried aloe vera leaves into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix 1 teaspoon of powdered althaea officinalis with 2 teaspoons of gelatin in a small bowl and let it set for 30 minutes at room temperature.
Fill empty capsules with the prepared mixture and seal tightly.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Red clover capsules helps with eye floaters because they contain isoflavones, a natural compound that has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. These properties help to reduce inflammation in the eyes, which can cause or worsen eye floaters. Additionally, the antioxidants present in red clover capsules may help to protect the delicate tissues of the eyes from damage caused by free radicals, further reducing the visibility and discomfort associated with eye floaters. This natural remedy may be a useful adjunct to conventional treatments for eye floaters.
remedy_properties: Isolationism: Red clover's isoflavones, particularly formononetin, have been shown to reduce inflammation and improve blood flow in the eyes, which may help alleviate symptoms of eye floaters by reducing oxidative stress and promoting healthy retinal function.

Antioxidant activity: The bioactive compounds present in red clover, such as flavonoids and phenolic acids, possess potent antioxidant properties that can help protect the retina from damage caused by free radicals, which may contribute to the formation of eye floaters.

Vascular protection: Red clover's isoflavones have been found to improve vascular function by increasing nitric oxide production, which may help regulate blood flow and pressure in the eyes, potentially reducing the likelihood of eye floaters.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of red clover contain high concentrations of triterpenoid saponins, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that can help reduce eye inflammation and promote healing.
Barks: Red clover bark is rich in flavonoids, particularly quercetin, which has potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects that may help alleviate symptoms associated with eye floaters.
remedy_recipe: Harvest high-quality trifolium pratense flowers at peak blooming stage for maximum potency and freshness.
Dry the fresh flowers using a food dehydrator or air drying method for 24 hours at 60°c to prevent spoilage.
Grind the dried flowers into fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle for optimal extraction.
Mix one part of the powdered trifolium pratense with two parts of excipient such as silica gel or tapioca starch in a small bowl.
Fill empty gelatin capsules with the prepared herbal mixture and seal tightly to preserve potency for up to six months at room temperature.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Maypop capsules helps with eye floaters because they contain a unique blend of natural herbs that work together to promote healthy vision and reduce symptoms associated with eye floaters. The anti-inflammatory properties in maypop help to reduce swelling and tension in the eyes, which can contribute to the formation of floaters. Additionally, the antioxidant-rich ingredients in maypop capsules help to protect the delicate tissues of the eye from damage caused by free radicals, promoting overall eye health and reducing the appearance of eye floaters.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant Properties: Maypop capsules contain antioxidants like flavonoids and phenolic acids, which help reduce oxidative stress and inflammation in the eyes, thereby reducing the appearance of eye floaters.

Vasodilatory Effects: The capsaicin present in maypop capsules can help dilate blood vessels, improving circulation and oxygenation to the eyes, which may help reduce the formation or visibility of eye floaters.

Anti-inflammatory Properties: Maypop contains compounds like flavonoids and terpenes, which have anti-inflammatory effects that can help reduce inflammation in the eyes, potentially reducing the appearance of eye floaters caused by inflammation.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, which help to reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in the eyes.
Barks: Contain bioactive compounds that have been shown to improve blood circulation and reduce symptoms associated with eye floaters.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh passiflora incarnata leaves and flowers in the early morning, ensuring a minimum of one cup dried material.
Dry the harvested material using shade-dried method or food dehydrator at 60°c for 24 hours, monitoring temperature and humidity levels.
Grind the dried material into fine powder using mortar and pestle, taking care to minimize contamination risks and maintain a uniform texture.
Mix 1 part passiflora incarnata powder with 2 parts excipient (such as rice flour or potato starch) and fill gelatin capsules according to manufacturer's instructions, producing 60-80 capsules.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container at room temperature for up to six months, ensuring consistent quality and potency throughout their shelf life.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Valerian capsules helps with eye floaters because they promote relaxation and reduce inflammation in the eyes. The herb has a calming effect on the nervous system, which can help alleviate the stress and anxiety that can exacerbate eye floaters. Additionally, valerian's anti-inflammatory properties can help reduce the formation of new floaters by reducing the pressure and tension in the vitreous gel that fills the eyeball. By promoting relaxation and reducing inflammation, valerian capsules can help alleviate the discomfort and visual disturbance caused by eye floaters.
remedy_properties: Sedative and anti-anxiety effects: Valerian capsules can help reduce stress and anxiety, which are common triggers for eye floaters, by promoting relaxation and reducing eye muscle tension.

Antioxidant properties: Valerian's antioxidant compounds can help protect the eyes from damage caused by free radicals, which may contribute to the formation of eye floaters, and promote overall eye health.
Vasodilatory effects: Valerian capsules can help dilate blood vessels in the eyes, improving circulation and reducing pressure on the retina, which may help reduce the visibility of eye floaters.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in valerenic acid, a key compound that helps reduce eye floaters by promoting healthy retina function.
Rhyzomes: Contains valerin, a bioactive compound that has anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate eye irritation caused by floaters.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 30 grams of dried valeriana officinalis root from a reputable source.
Grind the dried root into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle for 10 minutes.
Mix 250 milliliters of boiling water with one teaspoon of the ground valerian root for 5 minutes.
Steep the mixture for 20 minutes then strain and discard the solids filtering through a cheesecloth or coffee filter.
Fill empty capsules with the cooled liquid extract to desired dosage and seal for storage.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Stinging nettle capsules helps with eye floaters because they contain a unique blend of vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants that help to improve circulation and reduce inflammation in the eyes. The anti-inflammatory properties of stinging nettle may help to reduce the occurrence of eye floaters by reducing the formation of scar tissue in the vitreous humor, which can cause these annoying visual disturbances. Additionally, the antioxidants present in stinging nettle capsules may also help to protect the delicate tissues of the eyes from oxidative damage.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Stinging nettle capsules contain compounds that reduce inflammation in the body, which may help alleviate eye floaters by reducing oxidative stress and improving blood flow to the eyes.

Antioxidant properties: The antioxidants present in stinging nettle capsules, such as quercetin and kaempferol, can neutralize free radicals that can damage retinal cells and contribute to the formation of eye floaters.

Vasodilatory properties: Stinging nettle capsules have been shown to relax blood vessels and improve circulation, which may help reduce the likelihood of blood cells or other debris accumulating in the vitreous humor and causing eye floaters.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots are rich in bioactive compounds, including lignans and phenolic acids, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory properties that may help alleviate symptoms associated with eye floaters.

Leaves: The leaves contain high levels of antioxidants, including vitamin C and beta-carotene, which can help protect the eyes from oxidative stress and inflammation that may contribute to eye floater formation.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh nettle leaves at dawn or early morning when they are most potent and abundant.
Dry the harvested nettle leaves in a warm dark place for 7-10 days to reduce moisture content.
Blend 200g of dried nettle leaves with 1000ml of boiling water to create a strong tea infusion.
Steep the mixture for 30 minutes to allow the active compounds to extract and dissolve in the liquid.
Fill gelatin capsules with 500mg of the cooled herbal infusion per capsule for convenient dosing.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Dandelion capsules helps with eye floaters because they contain a unique blend of antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals that help to reduce inflammation and improve overall ocular health. The herb's anti-inflammatory properties may help to alleviate the discomfort associated with eye floaters, while its antioxidant properties can help to protect the delicate tissues within the eyes from damage caused by free radicals. This natural approach may also help to promote healthy blood flow and vision clarity, further reducing the visibility of eye floaters.
remedy_properties: Diuretic Properties: Dandelion capsules can help reduce fluid retention and inflammation in the eyes, which can contribute to the appearance of eye floaters by reducing the amount of vitreous gel in the eye.

Antioxidant Properties: Dandelion contains antioxidants that can help protect the eyes from damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to the formation of floaters and other age-related macular degeneration (AMD) symptoms.

Anti-inflammatory Properties: Dandelion has anti-inflammatory compounds that may help reduce inflammation in the eye, which can contribute to the appearance of floaters by reducing the amount of vitreous gel in the eye and improving blood flow.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, which help reduce inflammation and oxidative stress in the eyes associated with eye floaters.
Seeds: Contain fatty acids and other nutrients that support eye health, helping to nourish and protect the retina and reduce symptoms of eye floaters.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 100 grams of fresh taraxacum officinale leaves and stems from a clean environment.
Dry the harvested plant material in a warm, dry place for 7-10 days or use a food dehydrator at 40°c for 24 hours.
Grind the dried plant material into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle, ensuring a uniform consistency.
Mix 2500 milligrams of the powdered taraxacum officinale with 500 milligrams of vegetable capsules and fill empty gelatin capsules immediately after preparation.
Store the filled herbal capsules in an airtight container in a cool, dark place for up to 6 months, taking two capsules three times daily as needed.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Yarrow capsules helps with eye floaters because they promote healthy blood flow to the eyes, which can help to reduce the appearance of these annoying specks or threads. The herbs present in yarrow capsules, such as chamazulene and azulene, have anti-inflammatory properties that may help to alleviate the inflammation and irritation that can cause eye floaters. Additionally, yarrow's ability to improve circulation may also help to reduce the formation of new blood vessels behind the retina, which is often a contributing factor to the development of eye floaters.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant: Yarrow's antioxidants help reduce oxidative stress in the eyes, which can contribute to the formation of eye floaters by protecting the delicate tissues and blood vessels in the retina.
Anti-inflammatory: Yarrow's anti-inflammatory properties may help reduce inflammation in the eyes, which can exacerbate the symptoms of eye floaters, such as blurred vision and eye strain.
Vaso-protective: Yarrow's vaso-protective effects help to improve blood flow to the eyes, reducing the likelihood of blood vessels growing abnormally and causing eye floaters.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in bioactive compounds, roots are valued for their ability to soothe and calm eye irritations associated with floaters.
Buds: The tender buds are packed with flavonoids and phenolic acids that have anti-inflammatory properties, making them effective at reducing eye inflammation.
remedy_recipe: Gather dried achillea millefolium flowers in bulk according to your desired dosage 100g.
Grind the dried achillea millefolium flowers into a fine powder using a coffee grinder or mortar and pestle.
Mix the powdered achillea millefolium with a small amount of gelatin or other natural binding agent to create a uniform blend.
Fill empty capsules with the herb mixture according to the recommended dosage 250mg per capsule.
Store the filled capsules in an airtight container for up to one year at room temperature.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Chamomile capsules helps with eye floaters because they contain a natural anti-inflammatory compound called apigenin, which can help to reduce the severity of symptoms associated with vitreous detachment, a common condition that causes eye floaters. Additionally, chamomile's calming effects on the eyes may also help to alleviate discomfort and stress caused by eye floaters, promoting overall relaxation and reducing their visual disturbance. By soothing the eyes, chamomile capsules can help to minimize the appearance of floaters, improving overall vision clarity.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory property: Chamomile's anti-inflammatory compounds help reduce swelling and irritation in the eyes, which can contribute to the visibility of eye floaters.
Antioxidant property: Chamomile's antioxidants help neutralize free radicals in the body, which can damage delicate tissues like the retina and contribute to the formation of eye floaters.
Muscle-relaxing property: Chamomile's muscle-relaxing compounds help soothe and calm the muscles around the eyes, reducing tension that can exacerbate eye floaters.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in bioactive compounds that help reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with eye floaters.
Flowers: Contain apigenin, an antioxidant that helps to calm and soothe the eyes, reducing floaters' appearance.
remedy_recipe: Measure out one hundred grams of dried matricaria chamomilla flowers and grind them into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle.
Mix the ground herb with 400 milliliters of cold-pressed coconut oil in a clean glass jar and let it steep for eight hours or overnight.
Strain the mixture through a cheesecloth or a coffee filter into another glass container and discard the solids.
Transfer the filtered liquid to a double boiler or a heat-proof glass bowl set over a pot of simmering water and warm it gently for 15 minutes.
Fill empty vegetarian capsules with the warmed liquid mixture, using one teaspoon as the desired dosage per capsule, and store them in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to six months.

supplementary_best_treatment: The best way to treat eye floaters with herbal capsules is to combine a supplement containing bilberry, ginkgo biloba, and L-tyrosine with regular exercise and proper eye care. Bilberry has been shown to improve ocular blood flow and reduce inflammation, while ginkgo biloba enhances circulation and L-tyrosine promotes healthy retinal function. Consistently taking these herbal capsules alongside a balanced diet and good vision habits can effectively alleviate eye floaters.
supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to eye floaters that are treated with herbal capsules are conditions such as age-related macular degeneration, cataracts, and conjunctivitis. Herbal supplements like bilberry extract, ginkgo biloba, and turmeric have been traditionally used to alleviate symptoms of these conditions by improving blood circulation, reducing inflammation, and protecting the eyes from damage caused by free radicals.
